capabilities.name: Lists & segmentation
capabilities.verify: manage_newsletter_subscribers skill; subscriber tab in NewsletterPage
capabilities.notes: Single subscriber list only — no segmentation anywhere (no segment skill, table, or UI).

capabilities.name: Newsletter templates
capabilities.verify: no reusable template skill or UI; block-based editor (newsletter/blocks extensions) is content, not templates

capabilities.name: Scheduled sends
capabilities.verify: schedule_at param on send_newsletter/manage_newsletters; scheduled_at column
capabilities.notes: Admin UI surface missing — NewsletterPage/NewsletterEditor have no scheduling control.

capabilities.name: Open/click stats
capabilities.verify: open_count tracked in newsletter-send edge fn and shown in NewsletterPage
capabilities.notes: Open tracking only — no click tracking on either surface.

capabilities.name: Unsubscribe management
capabilities.verify: manage_newsletter_subscribers remove action; NewsletterManagePage.tsx + newsletter-gdpr edge fn

capabilities.name: A/B testing
capabilities.verify: no A/B test skill, schema or UI (NewsletterPage 'variant' hits are Badge props)

capabilities.name: Drip/automation flows
capabilities.notes: Admin UI surface missing — no flow builder or sequence management page.

capabilities.name: Public subscribe (widget + skill)
capabilities.verify: newsletter_subscribe skill (scope external) + newsletter-subscribe edge fn; signup rendered via public blocks
